name: Default Growth Equity
description: Growth equity thesis: growth-stage technology companies with $10M+ ARR, 40-200% organic growth, strong unit economics. Focus on Series A-D companies that are category leaders or emerging disruptors in software, fintech, healthtech, and data infrastructure.
